title: arctanthemum hultenii
intro: Arctanthemum hultenii, also known as Arctic chamomile or Arctic daisy, is a perennial plant species native to the Arctic regions of Asia and Europe. The medicinal properties of Arctanthemum hultenii include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids, terpenoids, and sesquiterpenes. The health benefits of consuming Arctanthemum hultenii include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote better sleep. Arctanthemum hultenii can be prepared as an herbal tea by infusing the dried flowers in hot water, or as a tincture by mixing the plant's extract in a solvent.
